text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moments before the decisive battle that is the
autumn Tenno Sho, Mejiro Ardan reveals that she
feels blessed to have made this journey with me
by her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also reminisces about everything she's been
through with her cherished rivals, Sakura Chiyono
O and Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, she prepares to take on the autumn
Tenno Sho—the focus of a history meant to be.
